tasks.prompt:
Task: Check for new 2026 World Cup knockout stage results and update data.json.

1. Search for latest World Cup 2026 R16/QF/SF/Final results
2. If new results found, update `C:\Users\HUAWEI\OneDrive\Desktop\星湖街\世界杯\data.json` with scores, winners, status="done"
3. Also update `C:\Users\HUAWEI\OneDrive\Desktop\星湖街\世界杯\index.html` embedded data
4. Update lastUpdated timestamp and top scorers
5. AFTER updating, run: cd "C:\Users\HUAWEI\OneDrive\Desktop\星湖街\世界杯" && git add data.json index.html && git commit -m "auto: 赛果更新 $(date +%m-%d-%H%M)" && git push origin master
6. If no new results, output "数据已是最新" and do nothing
